description: Ed25519Signer, EcdsaP256Signer, and RsaPssSigner have no Debug, Clone, or Hash impls. Arc<dyn SigningBackend> is Clone (cheaply), so Clone is trivially derivable. Without Debug, callers cannot include these types in their own structs and derive Debug, forcing them to manually impl Debug or wrap the signer in a newtype. This is a public API shape that forecloses ergonomic downstream use. Adding these impls is semver-compatible but cannot be done after the crate stabilizes without coordinating with callers who may have written their own conflicting impls.
title: Signer types missing Debug and Clone impls
